title: lonchocarpus huetamoensis subsp. huetamoensis
intro: Lonchocarpus huetamoensis subsp. huetamoensis is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the Huetamo tree. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus huetamoensis subsp. huetamoensis include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of various infections. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are commonly used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
